title: Rollup Emails & Activities to parent item OR how to track staffer emails
excerpt: I’m using the CRM for political engagement; but often I will be emailing a range of staffers under a politician. I currently have staffers as subitems in the contacts CRM - with the politician they are under as the paren…

posts.author: mish.pony (Mish P)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using the CRM for political engagement; but often I will be emailing a range of staffers under a politician. I currently have staffers as subitems in the contacts CRM - with the politician they are under as the parent item. Is there a way to have all the emails with staffers combined in the parent Emails & Activities tab? Or what is an alternate solution; that isn’t recording all the staffer emails in the politician’s contact.

Thanks!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d recommend using a board for the staffers and a separate board for the politicians. THen use a connected column to connect the two together. Similar to how ‘contacts’ are connected to ‘Accounts’ in most CRMs

posts.author: mish.pony (Mish P)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks so much - have done that and it’s working perfectly!
